title: curio repens
intro: Curio repens, also known as Lomariopsis coriifolia, is a type of fern native to Australia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Curio repens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Curio repens are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
